description: Having the same value, measure, or status; balanced in worth. 'Kolo' names the recognition of same standing—not identical but equivalent in dignity.
sound_symbolism: The word balances evenly. 'Ko' completes with measured wholeness, equality recognized. 'Lo' opens with same standing, balance held.
grammatical_notes: Functions as adjective: 'kolo miona' (equal person). As verb: 'mia kolo' (I equalize). Recognizes 'rolia' (worth) in all. Foundation of 'theloma' (justice).

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Equal worth—all beings possess same fundamental dignity.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Equal voice—communication where all participants have same standing to speak.
